name_en: D-joy Small Size, 22cm preview, not yet in domestic stores!!️
name_cn:
D-joy Small Size, 22cm preview, not yet in domestic stores!!️
Brand new D-joy returns with the latest small size ✔️ trending like a bestseller 🔥, the bag comes with two shoulder straps, multiple carrying styles 🙋🏻‍♀️, looks beautiful and chic, classic quilted design 🥅, paired with soft lambskin for an elegant and stylish look 🌿
size:22.5*6*11.5cm
9240
